what_it_does: A pinned future noticeboard request that specifies a convergence dragnet job: map project-spaces, Keepers and their Supabase builds, time periods and address-space locations, reconstruct the vi-visual-dev/project-spaces/vi-visual convergence/merge, and track DNA slides/archetypes replacing wildcard's local vi-visual code, to be run later via existing dragnet rails.

notes: Pinned future dragnet spec for reconstructing an ecosystem convergence and code-to-DNA archetype migration, not current work.
questions: What distinguishes 'vi-visual-dev', 'vi-visual systems in supabase', and 'wildcard's local vi-visual code'?

purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose and content align: the file is a pinned future-request describing exactly that dragnet scope.
intention_signals: Preserve a complex, non-urgent ecosystem-history investigation as a discoverable channel artifact so it can be scheduled on the existing dragnet machinery when the operator loop closes.
novelty: It treats convergence archaeology and replacement tracking as a scheduled dragnet problem spanning both Supabase data history and codebase lineage, explicitly deferred.
contribution: Keeps a scoped future investigation alive: the specific questions, substrates, machinery, and companion-strand reference, without making it part of the current critical path.
